fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for a user session.

fields.name: timestamp_utc
fields.description: UTC timestamp of the interaction event.

fields.name: event_index
fields.description: Position of the event within the session.

fields.name: user_action
fields.description: Type of user interaction such as view, click, add_to_cart, purchase, or drop.

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Platform where interaction occurred (web, mobile, app).

fields.name: device_type
fields.description: Type of device used by the user.

fields.name: traffic_source
fields.description: Source from which the user arrived.

fields.name: time_spent_sec
fields.description: Time spent on the interaction in seconds.

fields.name: session_length
fields.description: Total number of events in the session.

fields.name: interaction_count
fields.description: Running count of interactions within the session.

fields.name: is_conversion
fields.description: Indicates whether the interaction resulted in a purchase (1 or 0).

fields.name: drop_off_flag
fields.description: Indicates whether the session ended without conversion (1 or 0).
